title: ZeroPress Theme Manifest (Runtime v0.7)
description: Metadata manifest for a ZeroPress theme package.

httpUrl.description: Credential-free absolute HTTP(S) URL. Runtime validation rejects whitespace, control characters, backslashes, and malformed percent encoding.

supportUrl.description: Credential-free absolute HTTP(S) URL or a non-empty mailto URL.

themeAssetPath.description: Theme-package-relative regular-file path. Runtime validation also rejects empty, dot, traversal, encoded separator, and encoded dot segments and verifies that the file exists.

menuSlotDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended menu id. It documents an expected id but does not assign a menu.
menuSlotDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended menu id. It documents an expected `menu_id` but does not assign a menu.

title.description: Non-blank human-readable label shown in helper UIs.

description.description: Optional non-blank help text explaining where the menu is typically rendered.

widgetAreaDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended widget area id. It documents an expected id but does not assign widgets.
widgetAreaDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended `widget_area_id`. It documents an expected id but does not assign widgets.

title.description: Non-blank human-readable label shown in helper UIs.

description.description: Optional non-blank help text explaining where the widget area is typically rendered.

collectionSlotDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended named collection id. It documents an expected id but does not assign collection items.
collectionSlotDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a recommended named collection id. It documents an expected collection id but does not assign collection items.

title.description: Non-blank human-readable label shown in helper UIs.

description.description: Optional non-blank help text explaining how the collection is rendered.

siteMetaDefinition.description: Admin-facing helper metadata for a site.meta key understood by the theme. It is a hint; core does not assign the value.
siteMetaDefinition.markdownDescription: Admin-facing helper metadata for a `site.meta` key understood by the theme. It is a hint; ZeroPress core does not assign the value.

title.description: Non-blank human-readable label shown in helper UIs.

description.description: Optional non-blank help text explaining how the theme uses this key.

type.description: Optional recommended scalar type for authoring tools.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.
$schema.markdownDescription: Optional JSON Schema URI or path used by editors and tooling. ZeroPress core does not interpret this value.

name.description: Non-blank human-readable theme name shown in admin UIs and listings. Runtime validation trims the value.
name.markdownDescription: Non-blank human-readable theme name shown in admin UIs and listings. Runtime validation trims the value.

namespace.description: Publisher or organization slug that owns the theme.
namespace.markdownDescription: Publisher or organization slug that owns the theme. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

slug.description: Unique theme identifier used in package and registry contexts.
slug.markdownDescription: Unique theme identifier used in package and registry contexts. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

version.markdownDescription: Theme version in SemVer 2.0.0 format, for example `1.0.0` or `1.2.3-beta.1+build.5`.

license.description: License identifier for the theme. Use an SPDX id from the allowlist or a LicenseRef-* identifier for commercial, marketplace, proprietary, or otherwise non-SPDX terms.
license.markdownDescription: License identifier for the theme. Use an SPDX id from the allowlist or a `LicenseRef-*` identifier for commercial, marketplace, proprietary, or otherwise non-SPDX terms.

author.description: Optional non-blank display name for the theme author or maintainer. Runtime validation trims the value.
author.markdownDescription: Optional non-blank display name for the theme author or maintainer. Runtime validation trims the value.

description.description: Optional non-blank short summary used in theme listings. Runtime validation trims the value.
description.markdownDescription: Optional non-blank short summary used in theme listings. Runtime validation trims the value.

thumbnail.description: Optional credential-free HTTP(S) URL or safe theme-package-relative regular-file path used for previews.
thumbnail.markdownDescription: Optional credential-free HTTP(S) URL or safe theme-package-relative regular-file path used for previews. Relative paths must name a file included in the theme package.

links.description: Optional public links for theme information, support, marketplace listings, and license terms.
links.markdownDescription: Optional public links for theme information, support, marketplace listings, and license terms. All values must be credential-free absolute HTTP(S) URLs; only `support` may instead use `mailto:`.

features.description: Optional theme capability flags exposed to the runtime and tooling.
features.markdownDescription: Optional theme capability flags exposed to the runtime and tooling. These flags declare whether the theme is designed to support comments, post index routes, or static search UI.

comments.description: Whether the theme supports the comments island capability. Omission behaves like false.
comments.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports the comments island capability. Omission behaves like `false`.

post_index.description: Whether the theme supports post index routes. Omission behaves like true; explicit false disables the route even when preview data requests it.
post_index.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports post index routes. Omission behaves like `true`; explicit `false` disables the route even when preview data requests it.

search.description: Whether the theme supports static search UI backed by ZeroPress search artifacts. Omission behaves like false.
search.markdownDescription: Whether the theme supports static search UI backed by ZeroPress search artifacts. Omission behaves like `false`.

menu_slots.description: Optional map of menu slots declared by the theme.
menu_slots.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended `menu_id` values declared by the theme. Keys are stable identifiers such as `primary`, `footer`, or `docs-sidebar`. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign menus or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended `menu_id` identifier. Start with a lowercase letter; then use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

widget_areas.description: Optional map of widget areas declared by the theme.
widget_areas.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended `widget_area_id` values declared by the theme. Keys are stable identifiers such as `sidebar`, `header`, or `docs-sidebar`. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign widgets or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended `widget_area_id` identifier. Start with a lowercase letter; then use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

site_meta.description: Optional map of site.meta keys understood by the theme.
site_meta.markdownDescription: Optional map of `site.meta` keys understood by the theme. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign values or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: `site.meta` key identifier. Use lowercase letters, digits, underscores, and internal hyphens only.

collection_slots.description: Optional map of collection slots declared by the theme.
collection_slots.markdownDescription: Optional map of recommended collection ids declared by the theme. This field is informational helper metadata for admin UIs and documentation; it does not assign collections or affect build behavior.

propertyNames.markdownDescription: Recommended collection identifier. Start with a lowercase letter; then use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

sidebar.title: Sidebar Widgets
sidebar.description: Widgets shown next to article and page content

header.title: Header Widgets
header.description: Optional widgets shown in the header area

show_sponsor_banner.title: Show Sponsor Banner
show_sponsor_banner.description: Whether to display the sponsor banner.
